/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libniryo_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libniryo_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/niryo_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/niryo_interfaces/msg/detection__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zidane/niryo_iws/build/niryo_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libniryo_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
